# Uplift Reel - Daily Movie Recommendation App

This is a React Native mobile application that delivers personalized daily movie recommendations based on user preferences, genres, and mood.

## Project Status
- [x] Project scaffolding created
- [x] Core recommendation system implemented
- [x] TypeScript types and interfaces defined
- [x] React Native app structure established
- [x] Context-based state management implemented
- [x] Core services (RecommendationEngine, DailyRecommendationService, MoodDetectionService, UserPreferenceManager)
- [x] Comprehensive documentation created
- [x] Algorithm flowchart and logic documented
- [ ] UI components implementation pending
- [ ] Testing and compilation pending

## Core Features
- Daily personalized movie recommendations
- Genre-based filtering (comedy, drama, thriller, horror, sci-fi, romance, action, documentary)
- IMDb rating range selection (1-10)
- Mood-based filtering with emoji input
- Preference customization (actors, directors, release year, runtime)
- Edge case handling for strict criteria
- Push notifications for daily recommendations

## Technical Stack
- React Native for cross-platform mobile development
- TypeScript for type safety
- Context API for state management
- AsyncStorage for local data persistence
- Push notifications for daily recommendations
